title: FOIA: Standard Records Request - Frederick, MD

communications.subject: Maryland Public Information Act Request: FOIA: Standard Records Request - Frederick, MD
communications.communication:
April 8, 2026

Re: Public Records Request — Holiday Lighting Procurement Records

Dear Records Custodian,

Pursuant to the Maryland Public Information Act (PIA) (Md. Code, GP § 4-101), I am writing to request access to and copies of the following public records from Frederick:

all records related to holiday lighting and seasonal decorative lighting services, including but not limited to: contracts,   ▎  purchase orders, invoices, bid submissions, vendor proposals, requests for proposals (RFPs), requests for qualifications     ▎ (RFQs), scope of work documents, vendor selection criteria, evaluation scoring sheets, and any correspondence with vendors    ▎ or contractors related to holiday or seasonal lighting services.

This request covers 10 years.

As you may be aware, the Maryland Public Information Act (PIA) requires a response within 10 days of receipt of this request.

I would prefer to receive these records in electronic format (PDF, Excel, or other digital format) delivered via email to rfp@britenites.com. If electronic delivery is not available, please advise on alternative arrangements.

Regarding fees: I request a fee waiver as this information is being sought in the public interest. If a fee waiver is not available, please provide a cost estimate before proceeding with the request if anticipated fees will exceed $25.00.

If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption and provide any non-exempt portions that can be reasonably segregated.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this request. Please feel free to contact me at rfp@britenites.com if you have any questions or need clarification.

Sincerely,
Dillon Williams
rfp@britenites.com
